task.title: Tenant and User Management
task.description: Implement TenantService and UserService with database operations

implementation.details:
1. Implement TenantService CRUD operations
2. Add UserService with preference management
3. Set up PostgreSQL connection and queries
4. Add JWT authentication middleware
5. Implement role-based access control

task.acceptance_criteria: Can create/read/update tenants and users, authentication works, RBAC properly restricts access
